arts.ttl: 'We need to be' - Bruno Fernandes explains what Manchester United must improve this season
arts.sum: Man United won 2-1 against Rangers in the Europa League on Thursday as Bruno Fernandes scored a late winner.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim offers worrying Man Utd injury update on duo as problems mount
arts.sum: Manchester United defeated Rangers thanks to Bruno Fernandes' late goal at Old Trafford but Ruben Amorim came away from the game with some injury worries after being forced into substitutions

arts.ttl: Man United injury news: Red Devils suffer double blow against Rangers with key duo now major doubts for Fulham clash
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim says that Matthijs de Ligt and Leny Yoro will both need to be assessed after suffering problems against Rangers on Thursday night.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford's possible Man Utd farewell says it all about sad fall from grace
arts.sum: Manchester United beat Rangers 2-1 in the Europa League on Thursday night with out-of-favour wantaway striker Marcus Rashford watching on from the stands - while Ruben Amorim had three substitute spots vacant

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim indebted to Bruno Fernandes after latest Man Utd rescue act
arts.sum: Bruno Fernandes scored a last-gasp winner to allow Manchester United to beat Rangers in their Europa League clash after Cyriel Dessers had netted a late equaliser

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand seethes as Rangers 'get away with one' vs Man Utd but young Bears leave him impressed – VIP pundits react
arts.sum: Alan Hutton had no argument after the decision to disallow Mathhijs De Ligt's first half header was slammed by Ferdinand

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand hits out at Bruno Fernandes' critics as he hails the Man United captain after he saved Red Devils against Rangers
arts.sum: Rio Ferdinand has hit out at Bruno Fernandes' critics after the Manchester United captain saved his side against Rangers.

arts.ttl: Manchester United fans are all saying the same thing about the team's corner kick routine
arts.sum: Manchester United fans were quick to take to social media on Thursday night after they noticed a common theme regarding the team's corner kicks in their Europa League match against Rangers.

arts.ttl: Manchester United release statement after Rangers fans obtain tickets in Old Trafford home section
arts.sum: Man United played Rangers in the Europa League on Thursday night and away fans bought tickets in the home section.

arts.ttl: Who can Rangers face in the Europa League knockout rounds? Potential opponents and fixtures dates
arts.sum: Thursday nights have been ones to remember for the Light Blues support and they'll have more drama at Ibrox to look forward to
